synopsis: Whether you're writing a paper at midnight or pitching a freelance client, ChatGPT can do a lot of the heavy lifting â if you know how to use it properly. This course teaches you the workflows that actually save time and the habits that keep you sharp instead of dependent.
rationale: ChatGPT is the most-used AI tool among young adults yet most users operate well below its potential, missing features and workflows that would dramatically improve their output.
learning_outcome: After this course, you can run effective ChatGPT workflows for both academic and paid work, and configure it to fit your specific goals and constraints.
